experience.title: General Manager
experience.description: EDITION Hotels marks the next chapter in the lifestyle hotel story. The new Brand was conceived by Ian Schrager in a partnership with Marriott International. It combines the personal, intimate, individualized and unique lodging experience that Ian Schrager is known for, with the global reach, operational expertise and scale of Marriott.

experience.title: Chief Operating Officer
experience.description: My role was to lead a team that have created a new hotel brand for some iconic ‘Grand Dame’ hotels for leading Private Equity expert Starwood Capital. PRINCIPAL brought together a collection of UK hotels in cities that have shaped Britain’s history. Based in landmark buildings in well-known neighbourhoods, each hotel celebrated the stories of its surroundings and offered guests a well-considered blend of heritage and modernity: the “Best of British.” With the backing of Starwood Capital, the hotel received a multi-million Capex programme to help position them uniquely with a view of them being sold as a portfolio. Principal was sold to French Real-Estate Investor Covivio for £858 Million representing a substantial return for Starwood.

experience.title: Vice President - UK Operations
experience.description: Responsible for the successful integration of 12 award winning UK hotels from Starwood Capital into the IHG Family along with IHG's UK Managed Hotels including the Flagship Intercontinental London Park Lane. The acquisition of Principal established IHG as the leading luxury hotel operator in the UK, taking it to more than 2,000 rooms in this valuable, fast growing segment including the flagship Kimpton Fitzroy in London.
